summary: All four validation tests executed with artifacts created. Test 1 deployed to Zo.space, Test 2 produced standalone HTML, Test 3 captured a reusable template, Test 4 generated 3 distinct design variants.

test_1_vibe_only.notes: Deployed to va.zo.space/frontend-test. Clean consulting landing page with warm stone tones, amber accents. No purple gradients or AI slop. Professional but approachable.

test_2_template_html.notes: Generated cadence-landing.html using minimal-saas template. Applied Inter font, #0A0A0A primary, #2563EB accent. Follows template's centered hero, 3-col features, single testimonial structure. Self-contained HTML with Tailwind CDN.

test_3_template_capture.notes: Captured warm-consulting.yaml from the Test 1 output. Extracted palette (stone-50 bg, amber-600 accent), typography (system-ui, semibold headings), layout patterns (fixed nav, 2x2 grid, timeline), and detailed style_notes capturing the 'professional but warm' aesthetic.

test_4_multi_variant.notes: Generated 3 genuinely distinct variants for Stillness meditation app: (1) Serene & Organic - sage greens, serif Cormorant Garamond headings, warm cream background, rounded-full buttons; (2) Bold & Modern - dark mode, Space Grotesk, purple accent, geometric shapes, stats bar; (3) Playful & Warm - sunny amber background, emoji accents, casual copy ('no woo-woo'), DM Sans font. Not just color swaps - different layouts, typography, tone, and content approach.
